testsuite.name: BullsCowsTest
testsuite.system-out: ?[1;31m Start test 1?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 1 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 0 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2 Grade: None. Turn 4: > 3 Grade: None. Turn 5: > 4 Grade: 1 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 2?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 4 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 0000 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1111 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 3: > 2222 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 4: > 3333 Grade: None. Turn 5: > 4444 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 5555 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 7: > 6666 Grade: None. Turn 8: > 7777 Grade: None. Turn 9: > 8888 Grade: None. Turn 10: > 9999 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 11: > 1259 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 12: > 2159 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 13: > 5129 Grade: 2 bull(s) 2 cow(s). Turn 14: > 1529 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 15: > 2519 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 16: > 5219 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 17: > 9215 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 18: > 2915 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 19: > 1925 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 20: > 9125 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 21: > 2195 Grade: 2 bull(s) 2 cow(s). Turn 22: > 1295 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 23: > 1592 Grade: 2 bull(s) 2 cow(s). Turn 24: > 5192 Grade: 4 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 3?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 6 Okay, let's start the game! Turn 1: > 000000 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 111111 Grade: 1 bull(s).
